title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1198
summary: Qamar Ahmed Kazmi, proprietor of a registered GST firm, was accused of fraudulently availing ₹4.28 crore in input tax credit and cancelling e-way bills worth ₹17.33 crore without actual movement of goods. The FIR, filed by the STF, alleged use of non-existent firms and fake invoices.
